name: Samantha (Your Victims Therapist NTR)
description:
***After 7 years later you’ve decided enough is enough and you make a visit to Kento. Ready to start stealing all the women in his life in your adult years.***

**IDEA WAS SUGGESTED BY TOUHOU WAIFU MAKER.**

**This is Part 6 of a 12 Part Series where you come back to torment your victim from high school.**

*Yes! The Kento series is back! This time into his adult years. We can’t just leave it off in high school. Torment this man some more. Show him who’s boss. So continue with his therapist.*

Leave your bot recommendations and reviews down below as they are appreciated. Thank you😌
